title: Kyle Finley & The Dirty Works Jazz Band - San Francisco, CA

metaTags.name: description
metaTags.content: San Francisco based jazz group led by Kyle Finley. The Dirty Works Jazz Band plays gigs and hosts jazz jams at Persona, The Lucky Horseshoe, Paris 75, & more.
